case_title: SPAULDING HOTEL VS. BRETT NORMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPAULDING HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, BRETT , AN INDIVIDUAL
